2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 28 9.2 STEAM TURBINE AND AUXILIARIES (FOR EACH UNIT) 9.2.1 Steam Turbine i) Front bearing (complete set of bearing assembly including 1set torous, intermediate pieces sole / base plate and all other fixing/ assembly materials required to complete one bearing assembly except housing) ii) Front pedestal oil guard ring (complete set of oil guard 1 set assembly for front and rear with fixing material) iii) High Pressure (HP) shaft seals (complete set of interstage seals 1 set of all the stages of moving blades of HP rotor with fixing material) iv) HP shaft gland seals (complete set for replacement of front 1 set and rear with fixing material) v) Sealing of HP casing assembly (1 set should comprise of sealing 1 set segments, fitted keys, pins, caulking material and interstage sealings of all the stationary rows) vi) Sealing of HP inlet and HP e xhaust assembly (sealing rings, 1set lockwashers, connecting nuts/ capnuts between pipe and casing) vii) HP
